strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple production platforms
Strong software craftsmanship background including TDD, CI/CD, and clean architecture practices
Relevant exposure to AI/LLM tooling, Docker/Kubernetes deployments, and diverse data integration work
concerns: Significantly overqualified for an entry-level / junior-mid role given staff and senior titles since 2014
Primary database experience is MongoDB; limited explicit PostgreSQL track record
Berlin-based candidate but role requires high on-site presence — location/commute fit unverified
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise in the exact technologies named (TypeScript, Node.js, React) along with relevant infrastructure, AI tooling, and architecture experience that would easily cover the technical requirements. However, the role is explicitly entry to mid-level, and this candidate has held senior and staff positions for over a decade, creating a strong seniority and likely compensation mismatch. Relational/PostgreSQL exposure is also lighter than the MongoDB-heavy history suggests is ideal.
